---
id: list-payment-sources
title: "List payment sources for an organization"
description: "Retrieves all payment methods (credit cards, PayPal) for a given organization."
sidebar_label: "List payment sources for an organization"

  as={"h1"}

  children={"List payment sources for an organization"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/v1/partners/payment-sources"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Retrieves all payment methods (credit cards, PayPal) for a given organization.

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={[{"name":"organizationId","required":true,"in":"query","description":"External organization ID","schema":{"type":"string"}}]}
>

  title={"Body"}
  body={undefined}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
  responses={{"200":{"description":"List of payment sources"},"401":{"description":"Unauthorized - Invalid or missing authentication token"},"403":{"description":"Forbidden - Organization does not belong to the partner"}}}
>
